content_of_post_to_comment: I posted something in a forum and I kid you not almost all the replies were bots. You go to their profiles and they have the same bios except they change specific details. Like??
comment: Yeah I’ve noticed that pattern on a few smaller forums too, where profiles look autogenerated and only swap out a couple fields in the bio. Feels like either spam networks testing accounts or scraped AI farms. Were the replies actually relevant or just generic engagement bait?
